title: Diversity, equity and inclusion; amend provisions concerning.
summary: An Act To Amend Section 37-191-5, Mississippi Code Of 1972, To Remove Section 37-191-3(d) From A List Of Prohibited Divisive Concepts; To Amend Section 37-191-9, Mississippi Code Of 1972, To Make Technical, Nonsubstantive Amendments; To Bring Forward Sections 37-191-1, 37-191-3, 37-191-7, 37-191-11, 37-191-13, 37-191-15 And 37-191-17, Mississippi Code Of 1972, For Purposes Of Possible Amendment; And For Related Purposes.
